ksa_text: Skill in designing data analysis structures and developing data models, including semantic modeling, dimensional design, and organizing data elements to support efficient analytical workflows.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.406) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Engineering. Without stronger framework alignment, this skill KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain skill KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Engineering roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Recent job postings for Director of Data Engineering roles increasingly include Applied Analytics & BI competencies as organizations broaden role scope. External evidence supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Overturn: evolving market expectations for Director of Data Engineering now include Applied Analytics & BI competencies. Revised to include.

decision_rationale: Initially excluded but overturned through adversarial review. Applied Analytics & BI skill KSA is relevant to the Director of Data Engineering based on external evidence and internal consistency re-evaluation.
